claim_ceiling: This index proves that a source-native starting card exists and links contributors to provisional channel identities by normalized exact name or an explicit administrative resolution record. It does not prove identity, episode topic, dossier completeness, baseline reproduction, comparison eligibility, repair, superiority, or scientific admission.

policies.comparison_unit: program_version x role x question x evidence_packet

channel_people_without_source_cards.canonical_name: Claudia Passos [full surname form to verify]

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: Anand Jayprakash Vaidya, comparative philosopher and epistemologist
John Greenewald Jr.; FOIA researcher and operator of The Black Vault document archive
administrative_resolution_records.notes: The source-resolved contribution is evidence acquisition, provenance, and government-record archiving, not a distinct physical or metaphysical model. Retain as a possible evidence-audit tooling donor; do not score absence of a model as scientific weakness.

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: Host-only reading/exposition format; no guest identity to resolve
administrative_resolution_records.notes: Plato's allegory can be added later as a historical philosophical source if a declared comparison question requires it; this feed item is not itself a guest program.

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: William Edward Hahn, PhD; FAU Machine Perception and Cognitive Robotics researcher
Ross Coulthart; investigative journalist and UAP author/interviewer
administrative_resolution_records.notes: The appearances concern testimony, documents, and disclosure claims rather than a source-native scientific model. Any later use belongs in an evidence-provenance lane with claim-by-claim corroboration, not in a model ranking.
The card is contributor- and version-specific; it does not treat all Boyle or Turok work as one program.

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: Eric Weinstein; Geometric Unity proposer and public commentator
administrative_resolution_records.notes: The UAP panel appearance is a separate non-model context and must not be merged into the Geometric Unity program card.

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: Douglas Lain; novelist, editor, and left/critical-theory media producer
administrative_resolution_records.notes: The appearance compares Marxism, revolution, and Christianity. It may furnish ideological or social-theory critique, but no distinct executable scientific model relevant to the present campaign was located.

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: Marwa ElDiwiny; soft-robotics researcher and creator/host of the Soft Robotics podcast
Aephraim M. Steinberg; experimental quantum physicist
Rupert Sheldrake; morphic-resonance and anomalous-cognition claimant
administrative_resolution_records.notes: Keep this program separate from Chris Langan and Thomas Campbell despite the older registry grouping.

administrative_resolution_records.identity_or_format_resolution: Chiara Marletto; constructor-theory and quantum-information physicist

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Channel episode: 'John Donoghue: We Have Already Quantized Gravity (And It Works)'.
administrative_resolution_records.note: No duplicate created.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Three linked channel groups concern the divided brain, limits of reason/language, and meaning; source-native books confirm a distinct hemisphere-attention program.
Five channel episodes span CPT-symmetric cosmology, black-hole interiors and routes to quantum gravity.
administrative_resolution_records.note: The existing CPT card is not a proxy for all Turok programs; black-hole and other quantum-gravity versions still require separate source packets.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: A 25-episode host-prefix group mixes explainers, documentaries and host-only reflections across unrelated subjects.
administrative_resolution_records.note: It is not one person-to-program unit and must be decomposed episode-by-episode if the host's original technical programs are later assessed.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Six linked groups discuss computation, consciousness, AI, Friston and Levin; authored dissertation and public implementation identify MicroPsi as a distinct executable program.
The channel episode concerns AI consciousness, simulation and inability to win; authored papers support a narrower, distinct AI predictability/control-limits program.
Two gravity episodes and the dRGT primary literature identify a distinct ghost-free massive-gravity program.
Only linked title: 'Tevin and Curt Jaimungal: Consciousness, Podcasting, and UFOs'; surname and source-native research identity are unresolved.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Do not infer a model from a one-name title.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The channel episode explicitly concerns quantum gravity in the Wolfram Physics Project; authored papers identify a distinct hypergraph-rewriting and computational-GR program.

The RSS description concerns epistemic shock, truth-seeking and AGI ethics; Lynch's official UConn page confirms work on truth and the ethics/epistemology of technology and current concern with AI undermining understanding.
Linked titles concern ego death, God, dream reality, infinite consciousness and free will; this batch located no source-native formal or empirical program meeting the campaign contract.
administrative_resolution_records.note: This is a scope classification, not a ranking of the person or worldview.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Channel episode: 'Stuart Kauffman: There Is No Theory of Everything'.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Existing card already separates philosophical unprestatability from executable catalytic and adjacent-possible models.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Only linked title concerns meaning, God and Sam Harris; no distinct source-native technical model was located for the current comparison surfaces.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Theological relevance can be revisited under a separately defined philosophical packet.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Only linked title concerns Bigfoot, orbs and wilderness anomalies; no distinct source-native technical program was located for this campaign.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Testimony or anomaly reports would require a different evidence contract.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Two linked episodes concern a classical-gravity alternative to quantization.
administrative_resolution_records.note: No duplicate created.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Three linked episodes concern the Langlands program, mathematical proof and metaphysical extrapolation; the existing card already separates exact geometric/quantum Langlands work from ToE rhetoric.
administrative_resolution_records.note: No duplicate created; personal or death/self discussion is not promoted into a second scientific program.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode concerns UFO phenomena with Kevin Knuth. Vallée has source-native anomaly-taxonomy and anti-ETH arguments, and coauthored a 2025 survey of UAP research, but this batch found no locked mechanism or common evidence packet bearing directly on Joshua's current model surfaces.
administrative_resolution_records.note: This is a scope disposition, not a negative score. Reopen under an anomaly-data packet with provenance, sensor likelihoods and explicit rival hypotheses.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Although the linked title foregrounds conscious superpositions, Neven's authored primary record supports a distinct experimental quantum-computing program; the consciousness claim is excluded.
The title 'CIIS and Curt Jaimungal: Consciousness, Spacetime, and the Limits of Science' combines an institution acronym and host rather than identifying a source-native program contributor.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Resolve the underlying event participants before creating any person-to-program edge.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode concerns religion, atheism and Heidegger. Pasulka's authored program is historical and ethnographic study of religion, technology and UFO belief, not a formal consciousness, physics or cosmogenesis model under this campaign contract.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Potential donor for sociology of belief and model uptake; not ranking-eligible as a physical model.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode explicitly concerns E8 unification; authored papers and a primary representation-theoretic no-go define a distinct, sharply testable program packet.
The linked episode asks whether consciousness follows rules of relativity; Lahav and Neemeh's paper identifies a distinct observer-relative consciousness hypothesis.

The linked episode concerns non-duality, God and death. Spira's official presentation is a contemplative Direct Path/non-dual teaching, not a source-native formal or empirical program meeting the campaign's common comparison contract.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Philosophical comparison may be reopened under a separately defined phenomenology packet; this is not a worldview score.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode concerns gravity as entropy; the existing card covers the 1995 local-horizon thermodynamic derivation and separates later entanglement-equilibrium work.
administrative_resolution_records.note: No duplicate created.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: Two linked episodes concern the monotheism theorem, uncaused causation and absolute scientific limits; the source-native inference-device theorems define a distinct formal impossibility program.

Five linked groups span the Free Energy Principle, active inference, consciousness and collaborations with Levin and Fields. The existing card already separates Bayesian mechanics, active inference and descendant versions.
administrative_resolution_records.note: The separate Fields/Friston quantum-reference-frame collaboration remains native_source_cards_batch_b.json#fields_observer_quantum_information; no monolithic Friston card is created.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The only linked item is 'Gen Zed and Curt Jaimungal: Simulation Hypothesis and Consciousness'; the feed supplies only a one-name identity and channel link, and this batch located no authored technical paper, executable model or stable source-native program to assess.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Do not infer a model from an episode theme or unresolved public identity.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode concerns thought experiments and mathematical reality. Brown's authored work defends thought experiments and mathematical Platonism; it is a relevant methodological critic but not an executable world-model or common-packet competitor.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Reopen as a critic packet asking whether Joshua's mathematics is discovered, stipulated or empirically constrained; do not rank the philosophy as a physical model.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode concerns self-defeating universal skepticism. Nagel's source-native work concerns knowledge, epistemic intuitions and recognition of knowledge, which bears on evaluator discipline but is not a technical ToE, dynamics or consciousness mechanism.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Use as an epistemic-critique donor for receipts and claim ceilings; no model ranking is appropriate.

administrative_resolution_records.evidence: The linked episode concerns controlled studies of remote viewing and psi. Mishlove is the New Thinking Allowed host and advocate; this batch found no distinct Mishlove-authored predictive mechanism suitable for Joshua's present common evidence packet.
administrative_resolution_records.note: Psi experiments, protocols and meta-analyses would need study-level cards with preregistration, blinding, leakage controls and independent replication; they should not be collapsed into a person score.
